name: Your the only one left
description:
"Im sobbing, im falling off, its not enough, im burning and yearning, can i call that love?"

I have listened to flop era for more than 56 HOURS!

Lowkey my favorite version of neru is definitely flop era...shes just so damn relatable

"My veiws are dropping so follow me dont you dare look away when I can be your idol"
creator: JessicaTheOne
